title: OAuth, Secrets, Identity, and Least Privilege · Protocol Clinic: Auth Boundary
summary: Secure a remote MCP server serving user-specific data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext auth boundary increment in an OAuth and credential-handling design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Decide when authentication and user authorization are required by data and action scope.
Create a connection, auth, timeout, output-limit, and version troubleshooting runbook.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
